RDG (Redress Given) — A9(b) average of races before the redress race

RRS A9(b): redress score is the average of the competitor's scores in races sailed before the race in which redress is granted, rounded to the nearest tenth (0.05 rounds up). 3 competitors, N=3, DNF score=4. Alice (sail 1) fails to finish race 3 and is granted redress under A9(b). Races before race 3: race 1 (2 pts, 2nd), race 2 (1 pt, 1st). Average = (2 + 1) / 2 = 1.5 → rounded to 1.5. With A9(a) the pool would include race 4 (2 pts) giving avg (2+1+2)/3=1.7 — different. Final: Bob 5 pts (rank 1), Alice 6.5 pts (rank 2), Carol 11 pts (rank 3).

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Rank Sail Boat Competitor R1 R2 R3 R4 Total
1st 2 Bob 1 2 1 1 5
2nd 1 Alice 2 1 RDG(1.5) 2 6.5
3rd 3 Carol 3 3 2 3 11

2 1 Alice 2
3 3 Carol 3

1 1 Alice 1
2 2 Bob 2
3 3 Carol 3

1 2 Bob 1
2 3 Carol 2
1 Alice 4 RDG

Rank Sail Boat Competitor Points
1 2 Bob 1
2 1 Alice 2
3 3 Carol 3
